description_long: This object is a sleek, rectangular mobile phone with a glossy black finish and a minimalist design. The front features a large, flat glass touchscreen with a single circular home button at the bottom and a small front-facing camera and sensor near the top. The back is also glass, displaying a prominent silver Apple logo in the center and a single camera lens with flash in the top left corner. The sides are framed with metallic bands, housing several physical buttons including volume controls and a mute switch on the left, and a power button on the right. The device is compact and thin, with a solid, premium feel typical of Apple iPhone models. The overall appearance is modern and refined, suitable for use in any urban environment.
description: A slim, glossy black mobile phone with a glass front and back, metallic sides, and a prominent Apple logo. Features a single rear camera, front home button, and side buttons for control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black glass touchscreen, circular home button, and front-facing camera.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim metallic frame and side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the silver Apple logo, single rear camera with flash, and product markings.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the metallic band and additional side buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, highly visible against the black glass surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single rear camera lens with flash is located in the top left corner on the back; a small front-facing camera is positioned near the top of the front screen.
attribute_button_layout: One circular home button is located below the front screen; two round volume buttons and a mute switch are on the left edge; a rectangular power button is on the right edge.
